case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. COURTNEY E STAMATIS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200008006) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED FEB-26-2020, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT STAMATIS, COURTNEY E
